name: Bullard's Best Yet Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 1-1/4 pounds venison (mixed beef and pork), ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and soak them overnight in water 2 inches above the beans.
2. Cook the beans in the same water until done; do not drain.
3. Add tomatoes and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Saute green peppers in salad oil for 5 minutes.
5. Add onions and cook until tender, stirring often.
6. Add garlic and cilantro.
7. Melt butter in a large skillet and saute meat for 15 minutes.
8. Add the meat to the onion mixture and stir in chili powder.
9. Cook for 10 minutes.
10. Add this to the beans and the spices.
11. Simmer covered for one hour; cook uncovered for 30 minutes.
